name: Northbaze Group AB (publ)
summary: Northbaze Group AB (publ) designs, develops, and produces earphones and equipment for portable media players worldwide. It offers earphones, speakers, leather cases for android devices, and mobile accessories under the CLINT, Jays Headphones, KAVAJ, and Krusell brand names. The company was formerly known as Jays Group AB (publ) and changed its name to Northbaze Group AB (publ). Northbaze Group AB (publ) was founded in 2006 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
